subject: Fw: Epstein
body:
l
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, August 6, 2007 11:36:01 AM
Subject: FW: Epstein


Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Jay Lefkowitz [mailto:JLefkowitz@kirkland.com] 
Sent: Monday, August 06, 2007 10:22 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fw: Epstein


Jeffrey - Here is my first draft of the letter.  Would you like me to
send it to jerry and alan?

Should we schedule a call this pm to discuss it?

    ----- Original Message -----

    From: Jay Lefkowitz
    Sent: 08/06/2007 11:02 AM EDT
    To: Jay Lefkowitz
    Subject: Epstein

(See attached file: 8.5.2007 Ltr from Starr to Acosta (AG
edits)_(12010190_3).DOC)
***********************************************************
The information contained in this communication is confidential, may be
attorney-client privileged, may constitute inside information, and is
intended only for the use of the addressee.  It is the property of
Kirkland & Ellis LLP or Kirkland & Ellis International LLP. 
Unauthorized use, disclosure or copying of this communication or any
part thereof is strictly prohibited and may be unlawful.  If you have
received this communication in error, please notify us immediately by
return e-mail or by e-mail to postmaster@kirkland.com, and destroy this
communication and all copies thereof, including all attachments.
***********************************************************
